title: XFB: open-source radio automation software
description: XFB is a cross-platform, open-source radio automation suite for broadcasters. It provides scheduled playlists, jingle and advertising rotation, a live audio FX engine (10-band equalizer, compressor, tempo-preserving reference-pitch retuning), DJ decks with scratchable jog wheels, an Icecast/Shoutcast streaming client, playlist waveform views with crossfade preparation and volume automation, gapless playback, and comprehensive accessibility support including screen-reader integration and full keyboard navigation.
